def negative_append_then_sort_each_iteration():
    rule_id = "append_then_sort_each_iteration"
    family = "hot_path"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "A collection is appended to and then sorted on each iteration instead of sorting once after accumulation."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
